title: Block Variants - Oh The Biomes We've Gone
description: Bring the variety of Block Variants to Oh The Biomes We've Gone
body:
![block overview](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1611/975/bvbwgblocks-png.png)

**Block Variants - Oh The Biomes We've Gone**, the long awaited expansion that extends the variety of [Block Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/block-variants) to [Oh The Biomes We've Gone (BWG)](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone).

Just like the original Block Variants, this expansion provides you with tons of new blocks that Biomes O' Plenty has been missing, like all the log stairs, slabs and walls, giving you even more creative freedom.

If there are any other block variants you need just let us know!

[![Our Discord Server](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/837670782753832991/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.com/invite/hwA9dd5bVh)
